commands: set -- submissions/*Advanced_Day1*.ipynb; if [ "$1" = 'submissions/*Advanced_Day1*.ipynb' ]; then echo 'ERROR: No matching Day 1 notebook found'; exit 1; fi; if [ "$#" -ne 1 ]; then echo 'ERROR: Multiple matching Day 1 notebooks found'; exit 1; fi; jupyter nbconvert --to script "$1" --output advanced_day1 --output-dir .
if [ ! -f advanced_day1.py ]; then echo 'ERROR: Notebook conversion failed - advanced_day1.py not found'; exit 1; fi
